caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Rain Impact Bimini Today
caribbean.paragraph: Bimini is experiencing sustained winds up to 27 kt with wave heights reaching 5.2 ft under a dominant WSW swell direction. Rain chances are high at 79 percent, creating moderate marine conditions but no small craft advisories at this time.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and Elevated Seas Impact Mykonos Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing sustained winds of 22 knots with wave heights reaching 8.3 feet and a dominant NNE swell period of 9 seconds. Rain chances are moderate at 59%, creating choppy conditions that warrant caution for small craft in the area.
